name: HortusFox
description: A collaborative plant tracking and management application
compose:
name: slashnode-hortusfox
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/danielbrendel/hortusfox-web:v5.8
    container_name: hortusfox-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      APP_ADMIN_EMAIL: umbrel@umbrel.local
      APP_ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      DB_HOST: hortusfox-db
      DB_PORT: '3306'
      DB_DATABASE: hortusfox
      DB_USERNAME: user
      DB_PASSWORD: password
      DB_CHARSET: utf8mb4
    volumes:
      - app_data-images:/var/www/html/public/img
      - app_data-logs:/var/www/html/app/logs
      - app_data-backup:/var/www/html/public/backup
      - app_data-themes:/var/www/html/public/themes
      - app_data-migrate:/var/www/html/app/migrations
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8838:80
  db:
    image: mariadb:11.4.7
    container_name: hortusfox-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: my-secret-pw
      MYSQL_DATABASE: hortusfox
      MYSQL_USER: user
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - db_data-db_data:/var/lib/mysql
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-images:
    name: slashnode-hortusfox_app_data-images
  app_data-logs:
    name: slashnode-hortusfox_app_data-logs
  app_data-backup:
    name: slashnode-hortusfox_app_data-backup
  app_data-themes:
    name: slashnode-hortusfox_app_data-themes
  app_data-migrate:
    name: slashnode-hortusfox_app_data-migrate
  db_data-db_data:
    name: slashnode-hortusfox_db_data-db_data
